summary: Added `index_task: std::sync::Mutex<Option<tokio::task::JoinHandle<()>>>` field to AgentStack to store the JoinHandle from the background codebase indexing tokio::spawn. Added `check_index_status()` async method that polls the handle only when `is_finished()` is true (non-blocking), awaits it to capture the JoinError, and logs an `error!` if the task panicked — consuming the handle so the panic is surfaced exactly once. Called `self.check_index_status().await` in stack_run.rs just before the codebase index is first read (before enriching the goal with relevance scores). Uses std::sync::Mutex (not tokio::sync::Mutex) to keep AgentStack Send without requiring an async lock on a non-async accessor path.
